description: 简单博客插件 PostgreSQL 数据库配置
note: 包含表结构、索引、约束、触发器、视图、函数和示例数据。支持全文搜索（pg_trgm + zhparser）和语义搜索（pgvector）

title_embedding.comment: 标题语义向量（384维，使用 all-MiniLM-L6-v2 等模型生成）

content_embedding.comment: 内容语义向量（768维，使用 all-mpnet-base-v2 等模型生成）

constraints.name: chk_published_at_logic
constraints.condition: (status = 'published' AND published_at IS NOT NULL) OR (status = 'draft')

functions.name: update_updated_at_column
functions.code: BEGIN NEW.updated_at = NOW(); RETURN NEW; END;

functions.name: update_content_vector
functions.code: BEGIN NEW.content_vector = to_tsvector('english', COALESCE(NEW.content, '')); RETURN NEW; END;

functions.name: update_content_zh_vector
functions.code: BEGIN NEW.content_zh_vector = to_tsvector('chinese', COALESCE(NEW.content, '')); RETURN NEW; END;

functions.name: update_title_embedding
functions.code: BEGIN NEW.title_embedding = COALESCE(NEW.title_embedding, NULL); RETURN NEW; END;
functions.description: 更新标题语义向量（实际由应用层生成向量）

functions.name: update_content_embedding
functions.code: BEGIN NEW.content_embedding = COALESCE(NEW.content_embedding, NULL); RETURN NEW; END;
functions.description: 更新内容语义向量（实际由应用层生成向量）

functions.name: set_published_at_on_publish
functions.code: BEGIN IF NEW.status = 'published' AND OLD.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'published' THEN NEW.published_at = NOW(); END IF; RETURN NEW; END;

functions.name: search_blog_posts_zh
functions.returns: TABLE(id BIGINT, title VARCHAR, content TEXT, rank REAL)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, ts_rank(t.content_zh_vector, plainto_tsquery('chinese', query_text)) as rank FROM simple_blog_posts t WHERE t.content_zh_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('chinese', query_text) AND t.status = 'published' ORDER BY rank DESC; END;

functions.name: get_blog_posts_stats
functions.returns: TABLE(total_posts BIGINT, published_posts BIGINT, draft_posts BIGINT, total_views BIGINT, total_likes BIGINT)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT as total_posts, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'published')::BIGINT as published_posts, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'draft')::BIGINT as draft_posts, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0)::BIGINT as total_views, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0)::BIGINT as total_likes FROM simple_blog_posts; END;

functions.name: search_blog_posts_semantic
functions.returns: TABLE(id BIGINT, title VARCHAR, content TEXT, similarity REAL)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, 1 - (t.content_embedding <=> query_vector) as similarity FROM simple_blog_posts t WHERE t.content_embedding IS NOT NULL AND t.status = 'published' ORDER BY t.content_embedding <=> query_vector LIMIT limit_count; END;
functions.description: 语义搜索（使用余弦相似度）

functions.name: search_blog_posts_semantic_title
functions.returns: TABLE(id BIGINT, title VARCHAR, content TEXT, similarity REAL)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, 1 - (t.title_embedding <=> query_vector) as similarity FROM simple_blog_posts t WHERE t.title_embedding IS NOT NULL AND t.status = 'published' ORDER BY t.title_embedding <=> query_vector LIMIT limit_count; END;

functions.name: search_blog_posts_hybrid
functions.returns: TABLE(id BIGINT, title VARCHAR, content TEXT, ts_rank_score REAL, similarity REAL, combined_score REAL)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, COALESCE(ts_rank(t.content_zh_vector, plainto_tsquery('chinese', query_text)), 0)::REAL as ts_rank_score, COALESCE(1 - (t.content_embedding <=> query_vector), 0)::REAL as similarity, (COALESCE(ts_rank(t.content_zh_vector, plainto_tsquery('chinese', query_text)), 0) * 0.3 + (1 - (t.content_embedding <=> query_vector)) * 0.7)::REAL as combined_score FROM simple_blog_posts t WHERE (t.content_zh_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('chinese', query_text) OR t.content_embedding IS NOT NULL) AND t.status = 'published' ORDER BY combined_score DESC LIMIT limit_count; END;
functions.description: 混合搜索：全文搜索 + 语义搜索（权重 30% 全文 + 70% 语义）

functions.name: get_similar_posts
functions.returns: TABLE(id BIGINT, title VARCHAR, content TEXT, similarity REAL)
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, 1 - (t.content_embedding <=> src.content_embedding) as similarity FROM simple_blog_posts t, (SELECT content_embedding FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE id = post_id) src WHERE t.id != post_id AND t.content_embedding IS NOT NULL AND t.status = 'published' ORDER BY t.content_embedding <=> src.content_embedding LIMIT limit_count; END;

functions.name: set_title_embedding
functions.code: BEGIN UPDATE simple_blog_posts SET title_embedding = embedding WHERE id = post_id; END;

functions.name: set_content_embedding
functions.code: BEGIN UPDATE simple_blog_posts SET content_embedding = embedding WHERE id = post_id; END;

functions.name: batch_generate_embeddings
functions.code: BEGIN RETURN QUERY WITH updated AS (UPDATE simple_blog_posts SET content_embedding = content_embedding WHERE content_embedding IS NULL AND status = 'published' RETURNING 1) SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT as processed_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE content_embedding IS NULL AND status = 'published')::BIGINT as remaining_count FROM updated LIMIT batch_size; END;
functions.description: 批量生成内容向量（用于迁移）

views.name: blog_posts_published_view
views.query: SELECT * FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' AND published_at <= NOW() ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, published_at DESC

views.name: blog_posts_draft_view
views.query: SELECT * FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'draft' ORDER BY updated_at DESC

views.name: blog_posts_featured_view
views.query: SELECT * FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' AND is_featured = true ORDER BY published_at DESC

views.name: blog_posts_popular_view
views.query: SELECT * FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY view_count DESC, published_at DESC LIMIT 10

views.name: blog_posts_recent_view
views.query: SELECT * FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 5

views.name: blog_categories_view
views.query: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as post_count, MAX(published_at) as last_post_date FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' AND category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY post_count DESC

views.name: blog_posts_with_embeddings_view
views.query: SELECT id, title, content, status, category, tags, view_count, like_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, vector_dims(title_embedding) as title_embedding_dims, vector_dims(content_embedding) as content_embedding_dims, CASE WHEN title_embedding IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_title_embedding, CASE WHEN content_embedding IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_content_embedding FROM simple_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published'
views.description: 包含向量信息的文章视图

data.title: 欢迎使用简单博客
data.content: 这是一个简单而强大的博客系统，支持全文搜索、标签分类等功能。

data.title: PostgreSQL 全文搜索实践
data.content: 本文介绍如何在PostgreSQL中实现高效的中英文全文搜索功能。

data.title: 我的第一篇草稿
data.content: 这是一篇尚未发布的草稿文章。
